subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Lord of all being and Possessor of all things visible and invisible! I entreat Thee by the pearls of the ocean of Thy knowledge
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مالک الوجود و سلطان الغیب و الشهود اسئلک بلئالی بحر علمک و تجلیات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
